content.stem: What number comes next in this pattern: 4, 7, 10, 13, ___
content.explanation: The pattern adds 3 each time: 4+3=7, 7+3=10, 10+3=13, so 13+3=16.

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Students may see an add 2 pattern from looking at every other number
Students may miscalculate the difference as 4 instead of 3
Students may think the pattern reverses and subtracts 1 from the last number
